Package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi

Class JsonApiResourceIdentifier

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi.JsonApiResourceIdentifier
@Marshalled public class JsonApiResourceIdentifier extends Object
Represents a JSON:API Resource Identifier Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Resource Identifier Objects.

A slim form of JsonApiResource used inside relationship data linkage. Carries only type, id, and an optional meta bag. type is a plain String for the same reasons documented on JsonApiResource.getType().

See Also:
